name: Explainable Routing
summary: Compare candidate capabilities on why_recommended, expected_cost, and quality signals, then select and explain the choice.
description: A copy-paste recipe for transparent, cost-aware capability selection: discover several candidates, compare them on the routing signals QVeris returns (why_recommended, expected_cost, success rate, latency), pick one with a bounded cost/reliability rule, and explain the decision before spending credits.

qveris.reason: Discover multiple candidate capabilities and read their routing signals.
Read parameter, billing, quality, and example metadata before execution.
Execute the selected capability once a choice is made.
Verify the final charge outcome after execution.

network.reason: Call QVeris API endpoints for discovery, execution, and audit.

marketplace.headline: Transparent, cost-aware capability selection with why_recommended and expected_cost.
marketplace.audience: Agents and developers that must justify capability choices and bound per-call spend.

examples.name: CLI candidate comparison
examples.command: qveris discover "public company stock quote and market data API" --limit 5 --json
